title: BC Track Pursuit Intervals
description: 10x 4km pursuit efforts (3-4 min each) with minimal rest
purpose: Track pursuit race preparation — sustained VO2max

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 70% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.

coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 70% for 10:00. Finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Starting strong. 10 reps to go. The first one sets your standard for the rest.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First interval: 3:30 at 108-118% FTP. Aero. Focus on pacing, not heroics.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First rep is always the hardest mentally. Once you're in it, commit fully. 10 intervals ahead.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First interval. Still optimistic. That'll change in about 3 minutes.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First interval: 3:30 at 108-118%. Settle in, don't overcook it.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/10. You're 21% through. The pain hasn't peaked yet. Save nothing.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 2/10. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 2: 118% for 3:30. Execute each rep with precision.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 2:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/10. You're 28% done. This is where average athletes quit. You're not average.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 3/10. Target 118% for 3:30. Next rest: 2:00.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 3/10. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/10. Only 7 more of these. 'Only.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 3/10. 118%, 85-90 rpm. This is where your aerobic ceiling gets raised.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 2:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 33% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 2:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.

coachingNotes.MIXED: 33% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 4/10. 26 minutes in. Your mind wants to negotiate. Don't.
